svg.title: Schema change RAG sync pipeline — Flyway migration triggers selective re-embedding into pgvector
svg.desc: When a Flyway migration runs on app startup, Spring Boot detects changed tables, re-extracts their schema, re-embeds and upserts into pgvector. Unchanged tables are skipped entirely.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Flyway integrate with Spring Boot to run migrations automatically on application startup before the app is ready?')
sendPrompt('Show me how Flyway runs pending SQL migration scripts on Spring Boot startup and records them in flyway_schema_history table')
sendPrompt('Write the flyway_schema_history query that returns all migration scripts applied after a given installed_rank checkpoint')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot ApplicationReadyEvent listener SchemaEmbeddingSync that reads flyway_schema_history and compares it to the last embedded version checkpoint')

sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot service that reads the migration SQL script text from flyway_schema_history and uses a regex to extract all table names affected by ALTER TABLE, CREATE TABLE or DROP TABLE statements')
sendPrompt('Write the SchemaExtractorService extractTable method that queries information_schema for a single table name and returns a fresh TableSchemaDto with all current columns, PKs and FKs')
sendPrompt('Write the buildChunkText method that generates an updated schema chunk string for a changed table, including the new columns added by the migration')
sendPrompt('Write the EmbeddingService reEmbed method that calls OpenAI embedding API for a single updated chunk text and returns the new float[] vector')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot JdbcTemplate upsert for schema_embeddings table using ON CONFLICT(table_name) DO UPDATE SET embedding, chunk_text, updated_at with pgvector')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot code that handles CREATE TABLE in a migration by inserting a brand new row into schema_embeddings with the new table chunk and embedding vector')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot code that handles DROP TABLE in a migration by deleting the corresponding row from schema_embeddings so stale vectors are removed')
sendPrompt('Write the Spring Boot code that saves the current Flyway installed_rank as the last embedded version checkpoint in schema_embeddings metadata table after sync completes')
g.text: update last synced version checkpoint → ready for queries

svg.text: unchanged tables · embeddings untouched · zero API calls wasted
